evidence_tier: B (reproducible, first-party; compiler-output fidelity, not target-SIEM execution)

environment.note: all four backends emit text; no commercial software runs

output: source="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4625
Image="*\\net.exe" CommandLine="* user *" CommandLine="* /add*"
Image="*\\powershell.exe" CommandLine IN ("* -enc *", "* -EncodedCommand *")
source="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=7045
source="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4624
Image="*\\whoami.exe"

source="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4625

| bin _time span=5m
| stats count as event_count by _time TargetUserName

| search event_count >= 10

logon_exec_temporal_ordered.error: NotImplementedError: Correlation type 'temporal_ordered' is not supported by backend.

output:
source="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4625

| bin _time span=10m
| stats count as event_count by _time IpAddress

| search event_count >= 30

| multisearch
[ search Image="*\\whoami.exe" | eval event_type="whoami_exec" ]
[ search Image="*\\powershell.exe" CommandLine IN ("* -enc *", "* -EncodedCommand *") | eval event_type="powershell_encoded" ]

| bin _time span=5m
| stats dc(event_type) as event_type_count by _time ComputerName

| search event_type_count >= 2

source="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4625

| bin _time span=10m
| stats dc(TargetUserName) as value_count by _time IpAddress

| search value_count >= 10
from * metadata _id, _index, _version | where winlog.channel=="Security" and event.code=="4625"
from * metadata _id, _index, _version | where ends_with(process.executable, "\\net.exe") and process.command_line like "* user *" and process.command_line like "* /add*"
from * metadata _id, _index, _version | where ends_with(process.executable, "\\powershell.exe") and (process.command_line like "* -enc *" or process.command_line like "* -EncodedCommand *")
from * metadata _id, _index, _version | where winlog.channel=="Security" and event.code=="7045"
from * metadata _id, _index, _version | where winlog.channel=="Security" and event.code=="4624"
from * metadata _id, _index, _version | where ends_with(process.executable, "\\whoami.exe")

from * metadata _id, _index, _version | where winlog.channel=="Security" and event.code=="4625"
| eval timebucket=date_trunc(5minutes, @timestamp) | stats event_count=count() by timebucket, winlog.event_data.TargetUserName
| where event_count >= 10

logon_exec_temporal_ordered.error: NotImplementedError: Correlation type 'temporal_ordered' is not supported by backend.

output:
from * metadata _id, _index, _version | where winlog.channel=="Security" and event.code=="4625"
| eval timebucket=date_trunc(10minutes, @timestamp) | stats event_count=count() by timebucket, source.ip
| where event_count >= 30

from * metadata _id, _index, _version | where (ends_with(process.executable, "\\whoami.exe")) or (ends_with(process.executable, "\\powershell.exe") and (process.command_line like "* -enc *" or process.command_line like "* -EncodedCommand *"))
| eval event_type=case(ends_with(process.executable, "\\whoami.exe"), "whoami_exec", ends_with(process.executable, "\\powershell.exe") and (process.command_line like "* -enc *" or process.command_line like "* -EncodedCommand *"), "powershell_encoded")
| eval timebucket=date_trunc(5minutes, @timestamp) | stats event_type_count=count_distinct(event_type) by timebucket, winlog.computer_name
| where event_type_count >= 2

from * metadata _id, _index, _version | where winlog.channel=="Security" and event.code=="4625"
| eval timebucket=date_trunc(10minutes, @timestamp) | stats value_count=count_distinct(winlog.event_data.TargetUserName) by timebucket, source.ip
| where value_count >= 10
winlog.channel:Security AND event.code:4625
process.executable:*\\net.exe AND (process.command_line:*\ user\ * AND process.command_line:*\ \/add*)
process.executable:*\\powershell.exe AND (process.command_line:(*\ \-enc\ * OR *\ \-EncodedCommand\ *))
winlog.channel:Security AND event.code:7045
winlog.channel:Security AND event.code:4624
process.executable:*\\whoami.exe

output: source=windows-security-* | where `winlog.channel`="Security" AND `event.code`="4625"
source=windows-process_creation-* | where LIKE(`process.executable`, "%net.exe") AND LIKE(`process.command_line`, "% user %") AND LIKE(`process.command_line`, "% /add%")
source=windows-process_creation-* | where LIKE(`process.executable`, "%powershell.exe") AND (LIKE(`process.command_line`, "% -enc %") OR LIKE(`process.command_line`, "% -EncodedCommand %"))
source=windows-security-* | where `winlog.channel`="Security" AND `event.code`="7045"
source=windows-security-* | where `winlog.channel`="Security" AND `event.code`="4624"
source=windows-process_creation-* | where LIKE(`process.executable`, "%whoami.exe")
| search source=windows-security-* | where `winlog.channel`="Security" AND `event.code`="4625" | stats count() as event_count by TargetUserName | where event_count >= 10

| multisearch [search source=windows-security-* | where `winlog.channel`="Security" AND `event.code`="4624"] [search source=windows-process_creation-* | where LIKE(`process.executable`, "%net.exe") AND LIKE(`process.command_line`, "% user %") AND LIKE(`process.command_line`, "% /add%")] | stats dc(EventID) as unique_rules by span(@timestamp, 10m), ComputerName | where unique_rules >= 2
| search source=windows-security-* | where `winlog.channel`="Security" AND `event.code`="4625" | stats count() as event_count by IpAddress | where event_count >= 30

| multisearch [search source=windows-process_creation-* | where LIKE(`process.executable`, "%whoami.exe")] [search source=windows-process_creation-* | where LIKE(`process.executable`, "%powershell.exe") AND (LIKE(`process.command_line`, "% -enc %") OR LIKE(`process.command_line`, "% -EncodedCommand %"))] | stats dc(EventID) as unique_rules by span(@timestamp, 5m), ComputerName | where unique_rules >= 2
| search source=windows-security-* | where `winlog.channel`="Security" AND `event.code`="4625" | stats dc(TargetUserName) as value_count by IpAddress | where value_count >= 10
